spoilers.text: Entire argument about finding op after final war make no sense for me at all. We always learning backstory before big fight/war, Rayleigh said Strawhats should find their own answer after they learn void century lore. Basically Robin only role is told us what happened 800y ago

misc.title: Imu is the villain around whom the essence of the story revolves، he's related with the void century, the ancient Kingdom, and it might even relate to the first world. So how could it not be the final
misc.text: Imu is the villain around whom the essence of the story revolves، he's related with the void century, the ancient Kingdom, and it might even relate to the first world. So how could it not be the final villain? There's a role for BB in all these chaos, but it's not final villain WorstGenHQ (@WorstGenHQ) #ONEPIECE1179 The debate about who the Final Villain will be is actually quite predictable from a narrative perspective. Blackbeard > Race for Pirate King title Imu > Final battle AFTER the One Piece is found Luffy will and must defeat Blackbeard beforehand. Imu arrives after the One Piece is found, explaining the final villian... — https://nitter.net/WorstGenHQ/status/2040713152090808684#m
